overview: Pawspective is a premium pet sitting marketplace that rivals Rover.com. Clients can browse sitters, book multi-service recurring appointments with a DoorDash-style live cart, and track their pet care in real time. Sitters manage their profiles, availability, invoices, and earnings. Admins oversee the entire platform with full analytics, sitter approvals, and booking management.
features: Multi-service booking wizard with live cart and bundle discounts
Sitter profiles with portfolio pages, per-service rates, and verification badges
Admin dashboard with analytics, sitter approvals, and booking management
Client booking lookup by phone or email with payment status
Professional invoice printing with gradient design and PAID stamp
Internet Identity passkey login for sitters and admins
Live activity feed with real-time service updates
Dark mode support with premium OKLCH color system
Sitter application flow with admin review and approval
Reviews and ratings system for completed bookings
